lockingPolicy.lockReason: Bugfix-fastlane admin-UI delivery; the scaffold + devices-page unit tests (render, auth/scoping, XSS) drive the proofs.

tdd.redGreenEvidence: report.md '## Test Evidence': the devices view now renders as HTML on the shared internal/web/admin scaffold; TestDevicesHandler_* prove render + empty-state + non-admin scoping + 401/403/500/405 + XSS escaping, and TestNavLinks_MarksActive + TestNewDevicesHandler_NilArgsPanic prove the scaffold helpers.

scenarios.title: Extension-devices admin page renders on the shared scaffold and escapes user-influenced values
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: GET /admin/extension/devices renders the shared scaffold chrome (DOCTYPE, nav links, active highlight) + an HTML device table reusing extensiondevices.Store; user-influenced source_device_id/owner_user_id are HTML-escaped (a <script> id is not rendered raw).

scenarios.title: Auth + scoping + scaffold helpers: 401/403/500/405, non-admin own-owner scoping, nav active, nil-arg guard
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Unauthenticated callers get 401 (store NOT queried); non-admin callers are scoped to their own owner_user_id (403 when absent); store error → 500; non-GET → 405; navLinks marks exactly one active link; NewDevicesHandler panics on nil store/gate.
